+def _existing(path: Path) -> bool:

-def scale_grid_to_abs(vals: List[float], image_width: float, image_height: float, grid_size: float = GRID_SIZE) -> List[float]:

-    if len(vals) == 2:

-        return [vals[0] * image_width / grid_size, vals[1] * image_height / grid_size]

-    return [

-        vals[0] * image_width / grid_size,

-        vals[1] * image_height / grid_size,

-        vals[2] * image_width / grid_size,

-        vals[3] * image_height / grid_size,

-    ]

+def _grid_to_abs_xy(gx: float, gy: float, image_width: float, image_height: float) -> List[float]:

+    x = gx / GRID_SIZE * float(image_width)

+    y = gy / GRID_SIZE * float(image_height)

+    return clip_point(x, y, float(image_width), float(image_height))

+

+

+def _grid_to_abs_bbox(vals: List[float], image_width: float, image_height: float) -> List[float]:

+    x1 = vals[0] / GRID_SIZE * float(image_width)

+    y1 = vals[1] / GRID_SIZE * float(image_height)

+    x2 = vals[2] / GRID_SIZE * float(image_width)

+    y2 = vals[3] / GRID_SIZE * float(image_height)

+    return clip_bbox(x1, y1, x2, y2, float(image_width), float(image_height))

-    raw = (text or "").strip()

-

+    raw = text.strip()

+

+    m = re.search(r"<point>\s*([\d.]+)[,\s]+([\d.]+)\s*</point>", raw, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        pt = _grid_to_abs_xy(float(m.group(1)), float(m.group(2)), image_width, image_height)

+        return ParsedPrediction("point", pt, raw)

+

+    m = re.search(r"<point[^>]*x1\s*=\s*['\"]?([\d.]+)['\"]?[^>]*y1\s*=\s*['\"]?([\d.]+)['\"]?[^>]*>", raw, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        pt = _grid_to_abs_xy(float(m.group(1)), float(m.group(2)), image_width, image_height)

+        return ParsedPrediction("point", pt, raw)

+    m = re.search(r"<box>\s*([\d.]+)[,\s]+([\d.]+)[,\s]+([\d.]+)[,\s]+([\d.]+)\s*</box>", raw, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        box = _grid_to_abs_bbox([float(m.group(i)) for i in range(1, 5)], image_width, image_height)

+        return ParsedPrediction("bbox", box, raw)

+

+    m = re.search(r"<bbox>\s*\(?\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*\)?\s*,?\s*\(?\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*\)?\s*</bbox>", raw, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        box = _grid_to_abs_bbox([float(m.group(i)) for i in range(1, 5)], image_width, image_height)

+        return ParsedPrediction("bbox", box, raw)

+

     if len(nums) >= 2:
